title: BEM-668 readiness/blocker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
auditor_reports=Path('governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports'); auditor_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
executor_reports=Path('governance/internal_contour/executor/reports'); executor_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size > 0

states={
 'telegram_smoke':load('governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json'),
 'curator_hourly':load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json'),
 'delivery_verification':load('governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'),
 'claude_runtime':load('governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json'),
 'architecture_lint':load('governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json'),
 'write_channel_smoke':load('governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json'),
 'auditor_verdict':load('governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem653_full_readiness_plan_verdict.json'),
 'bem665':load('governance/state/bem665_verify_dispatch_results_and_delivery.json'),
 'bem666':load('governance/state/bem666_read_delivery_state_and_decide_repair.json'),
 'bem667':load('governance/state/bem667_repair_based_on_delivery_decision.json')
}
wf_text={
 'telegram':read('.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'),
 'curator':read('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'),
 'dispatch_queue':read('governance/protocols/WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE.md')
}
smoke_ok=isinstance(states['telegram_smoke'],dict) and states['telegram_smoke'].get('delivery_confirmed') is True
hourly_ok=isinstance(states['curator_hourly'],dict) and states['curator_hourly'].get('telegram_delivery')=='sent'
verify_ok=isinstance(states['delivery_verification'],dict) and states['delivery_verification'].get('delivery_confirmed') is True
telegram_ready=smoke_ok and (hourly_ok or verify_ok)
write_ok=isinstance(states['write_channel_smoke'],dict) and states['write_channel_smoke'].get('status')=='pass'
lint_ok=isinstance(states['architecture_lint'],dict) and states['architecture_lint'].get('status')=='pass'
auditor_ok=isinstance(states['auditor_verdict'],dict) and states['auditor_verdict'].get('status')=='approved_with_mandatory_controls'
claude_ok=isinstance(states['claude_runtime'],dict) and states['claude_runtime'].get('claude_runtime_proven') is True
reserve_valid=True
checks=[
 {'id':'R1','name':'write_channel_restored','pass':write_ok,'evidence':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json'},
 {'id':'R2','name':'architecture_lint_pass','pass':lint_ok,'evidence':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json'},
 {'id':'R3','name':'auditor_plan_approved','pass':auditor_ok,'evidence':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem653_full_readiness_plan_verdict.json'},
 {'id':'R4','name':'telegram_smoke_delivery','pass':smoke_ok,'evidence':'governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json'},
 {'id':'R5','name':'hourly_delivery_or_verifier','pass':hourly_ok or verify_ok,'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json + governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'},
 {'id':'R6','name':'claude_runtime_or_reserve','pass':claude_ok or reserve_valid,'evidence':'governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json + provider route policy'},
 {'id':'R7','name':'telegram_workflow_yaml_safe','pass':'<<' not in wf_text['telegram'] and '$\'' not in wf_text['telegram'] and 'text@governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_message.txt' in wf_text['telegram'],'evidence':'.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'},
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
if not failed:
    status='production_ready'
    blocker=None
else:
    status='blocked_with_exact_reason'
    blocker={'code':'FULL_READINESS_BLOCKED','failed':failed,'telegram_states':{'smoke_ok':smoke_ok,'hourly_ok':hourly_ok,'verify_ok':verify_ok,'smoke_status':states['telegram_smoke'].get('status') if isinstance(states['telegram_smoke'],dict) else None,'hourly_delivery':states['curator_hourly'].get('telegram_delivery') if isinstance(states['curator_hourly'],dict) else None,'verification_status':states['delivery_verification'].get('status') if isinstance(states['delivery_verification'],dict) else None},'next_required_action':'If telegram smoke result is still missing/not_confirmed, run telegram-send-smoke.yml manually or via direct workflow_dispatch and inspect governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json.'}

final={'schema_version':'full_readiness_report.v1','bem':'BEM-668','status':status,'telegram_ready':telegram_ready,'checks':checks,'claude_runtime_proven':claude_ok,'reserve_valid':reserve_valid,'states':states,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(final,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker.md'
lines=['# BEM-668 | Final Readiness Or Exact Blocker','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)', '', '## Status', status, '', '## Checks']
for c in checks:
    lines.append('- '+c['id']+' | '+c['name']+': '+('PASS' if c['pass'] else 'FAIL')+' | '+c['evidence'])
lines += ['', '## Telegram state', json.dumps({'smoke_ok':smoke_ok,'hourly_ok':hourly_ok,'verify_ok':verify_ok},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)

# Mirror to canonical final report path expected by controls.
canonical=reports/'bem_final_readiness_report.md'
canonical.write_text(report.read_text(errors='ignore'))

# Internal auditor final verdict for this readiness attempt.
verdict={'schema_version':'internal_auditor_final_readiness_verdict.v1','bem':'BEM-668','status':'approved_ready' if status=='production_ready' else 'blocked_with_exact_reason','report':str(report),'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'}
verdict_file=auditor_reports/'bem668_final_readiness_verdict.json'
verdict_file.write_text(json.dumps(verdict,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
executor={'schema_version':'executor_final_readiness_result.v1','bem':'BEM-668','status':status,'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'}
executor_file=executor_reports/'bem668_final_readiness_executor_result.json'
executor_file.write_text(json.dumps(executor,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker','cycle_id':'bem668-final-readiness-or-exact-blocker','source':'final_monitor','status':status,'report':str(report),'canonical_report':str(canonical),'telegram_ready':telegram_ready,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'canonical_report':str(canonical),'telegram_ready':telegram_ready,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['full_readiness_status']=status
contour_state['telegram_delivery_repair_status']='confirmed' if telegram_ready else 'blocked_with_exact_reason'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 16:05 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-668 '+status.upper()+': telegram_ready='+str(telegram_ready)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(canonical),str(verdict_file),str(executor_file),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created final readiness report or exact blocker with checks, internal auditor verdict, executor result, and canonical report path')
"""
No issue comments.
